subcodes.first_line: O people of God! The heedless ones and the deniers have raised aloft the banner of hypocrisy [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا حزب الله معرضین و منکرین علم نفاق بر افراختند
subcodes.subjects: @suffering; rejection of Christ, @consorting with all; being kind; loving to all, @rejection, opposition and persecution
